description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat, multi-faceted roof and a combination of large and small rectangular windows. The exterior is primarily finished in a muted gray tone, with a prominent fenced terrace or patio area visible on one side, furnished with outdoor seating. The structure includes two visible stories, with the upper level partially overhanging the lower, creating a sheltered outdoor space. A set of exterior stairs leads from the ground level up to the terrace, suggesting easy access between levels. The main entryway is defined by a glass double door, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front and rear facades. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional outdoor living space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat, multi-faceted roof, gray exterior, large windows, and a fenced terrace with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with glass double doors and two large windows above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced terrace area and a mix of window sizes, with the flat roof clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the exterior staircase leading to the terrace and additional windows on both levels.
description_view_3: Back view displaying large windows on the lower level, the terrace with seating, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical placement on the sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with glass double doors, no porch, minimal steps, and a clean, modern appearance
